payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Overstuffed dark brown leather recliner armchair with glossy, creased upholstery and horizontal padded back tufting; padded armrests and wide single-seat cushion are visible, with a small tear/exposed lighter material at the lower right seam; right side is partially occluded/cropped by adjacent furniture — approximately 1.5 meters from the camera.
attributes: small tear at lower right seam
